title: Load classes via PSR-4 autoload, never manual require
description: Map namespaces to directories in composer.json so classes load on demand instead of hand-written require chains.
body: Use when adding a class or wiring a new directory of code. Do not include/require class files by path. Actions: declare the namespace-to-directory mapping under autoload.psr-4 in composer.json, name files to match the class and namespace, and run composer dump-autoload after changing the map. Validation signals include a new class resolving in a PHPUnit test with no manual require and composer's autoloader reporting no unmatched class. Risk boundary: hand-rolled require chains break ordering and duplicate definitions as the codebase grows; a class that only loads via an explicit require is a defect to convert to PSR-4.
